strengths: Successfully completed all six peg transfers without dropping any objects
Demonstrated proper bidirectional transfer technique as required by the task
Maintained consistent instrument control throughout the 4+ minute exercise
weaknesses: Completion time of 258 seconds is significantly slower than the target benchmark
Excessive hesitation and repositioning movements visible throughout the transfers
Inefficient pickup and release sequences leading to wasted motion

drills.name: Mid-air transfer ladder
drills.description: Practice 12 full transfers without touching the pegboard for support, focusing on smooth hand-to-hand exchanges

drills.name: Economy-of-motion ladder
drills.description: Perform the task phase slowly with minimal wasted regrasping, emphasizing direct pickup-to-placement movements

progression_note: At the novice level, prioritize smooth, deliberate movements over speed. Focus on developing consistent transfer mechanics before attempting to reduce completion time.
